intro: Week of 2026-05-11: the board is led by 7-Eleven 5 chilled soy sauce ramen, FamilyMart Mofusand waffle-frame character snack, Lawson Hokkaido azuki bean matcha shaved ice 175ml. Coverage spans 7-Eleven, FamilyMart, Lawson. Themes: collab, limited, regional, merch. Check limited and regional badges before planning a store run.
